ownership.name: Art Rooney II
ownership.style: Old-school stability; Rooney family has owned Steelers since 1933; patient with coaching hires
ownership.tendencies: Values loyalty and culture; typically promotes from within or hires proven coaches; rarely makes impulsive moves

gm.name: Omar Khan
gm.philosophy: Draft-and-develop; strong salary cap management; values picks and competitive contracts
gm.analytics_approach: Hybrid — increasing analytics adoption under Khan compared to Kevin Colbert era

head_coach.name: Mike McCarthy
head_coach.scheme_offense: Pro-style West Coast offense; play-action heavy; values run-pass balance; Super Bowl-winning HC (Green Bay)
head_coach.scheme_defense: Steelers traditional 3-4; aggressive blitz packages; zone coverage concepts

decision_makers.primary: Omar Khan (GM) with Mike McCarthy (HC) collaboration

roster_2026.qb_situation: unverified — likely Russell Wilson or new acquisition situation
key_signings: Michael Pittman Jr. (WR, acquired via trade from Colts)

needs.reason: Despite Pittman and Metcalf trades, WR3 Roman Wilson has only 164 career yards; McCarthy needs depth for his offense
Second most pressing need; three safeties with first-round grades in this class; prime position at #21 for day-one starter
Draft is deep at multiple positions Steelers need including offensive line; must protect QB investment
